# Talk Is Cheap

> Talk Is Cheap (talkischeap.io) is an all-in-one UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) platform for small and mid-size businesses: cloud business phone system, two-way SMS/MMS messaging, video meetings, AI receptionist, contact center, e-fax, analytics, and 100+ CRM/PMS integrations — built on carrier-grade infrastructure and priced from $14.99/user/month. The name is the pitch: enterprise-grade communications shouldn't cost enterprise money.

## What Talk Is Cheap Does

- Cloud VoIP business phone: unlimited US/Canada calling, auto-attendant/IVR, call queues, ring groups, call park, warm/blind transfer, visual voicemail with AI transcription, call recording, desk phone + desktop + mobile apps
- Screen-pop caller intelligence: inbound calls surface the caller's record, appointments, balance, and notes from your CRM/PMS before you answer
- Missed-call auto-text: every missed call gets an instant, customizable SMS so leads never go cold
- Unified inbox: SMS, webchat, voicemail, fax, and social DMs in one team-shared conversation view with tags, templates, scheduled send, and full history
- AI receptionist: answers calls and texts 24/7, books appointments, answers FAQs, escalates to staff with full context
- Video meetings: HD meetings with screen share, recording, and dial-in — no separate subscription
- Contact center: skills-based routing, live dashboards, supervisor monitor/whisper/barge, call intelligence with transcription, sentiment, and missed-revenue flags
- Automated outreach: appointment reminders with natural-language confirmations, recall/reactivation campaigns, review requests, bulk SMS
- Payments over text (Text-to-Pay) and online bill pay
- Analytics: phone, message, review, and revenue-opportunity dashboards
- Integrations: 100+ CRMs, practice-management systems, calendars, and helpdesks

- [Home](https://talkischeap.io/): Platform overview
- [Features](https://talkischeap.io/features): Full feature tour

- [Messaging](https://talkischeap.io/features/messaging): SMS, unified inbox, automations
- [Video Meetings](https://talkischeap.io/features/video-meetings): Built-in HD video
- [AI Receptionist](https://talkischeap.io/features/ai-receptionist): 24/7 AI call and text answering
- [Contact Center](https://talkischeap.io/features/contact-center): Queues, dashboards, call intelligence
- [Integrations](https://talkischeap.io/features/integrations): CRM/PMS/calendar integrations
- [Analytics](https://talkischeap.io/features/analytics): Communication and revenue analytics
- [Pricing](https://talkischeap.io/pricing): Straight Talk $14.99, Real Talk $29.99, Big Talk $44.99 per user/month (annual)
- [Industries](https://talkischeap.io/industries): Healthcare, legal, real estate, home services
- [FAQ](https://talkischeap.io/faq): Common questions about the platform, porting, pricing, reliability
- [Blog](https://talkischeap.io/blog): UCaaS guides and buyer resources
- [About](https://talkischeap.io/about): Company story and philosophy
- [Contact](https://talkischeap.io/contact): Sales and support contact

## Key Facts

- Product category: UCaaS / cloud business phone system / business communications platform
- Pricing: three tiers — Straight Talk ($14.99/user/mo), Real Talk ($29.99/user/mo, most popular), Big Talk ($44.99/user/mo); annual billing, ~20% discount vs monthly; no long-term contracts on monthly plans
- Reliability: 99.999% uptime target on geo-redundant carrier-grade infrastructure
- Free number porting, free onboarding and setup on all plans
- Security & compliance: TLS/SRTP encrypted calls, SOC 2-aligned controls, HIPAA-capable configurations with BAA on Real Talk and above
- Support: US-based human support on every plan
- Website: https://talkischeap.io
- Contact: hello@talkischeap.io
